chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 853 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3323/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.3324/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.3325/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 29-10-2025 Mr. Sartaj Haider, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition along with listed applications. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
